differences.new: method void org.faktorips.runtime.internal.Range::<init>(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, boolean, boolean, boolean)
differences.justification: FIPS-11459/FIPS-14060: New constructor to support open/closed interval bounds. Old constructor without these parameters is still available and defaults to closed intervals.
FIPS-11459/FIPS-14060: New XML attribute constant for reading open/closed lower bound from Range elements.
FIPS-11459/FIPS-14060: New XML attribute constant for reading open/closed upper bound from Range elements.
